sync_semantics.GREEN: keep moving — state fresh, no blockers, last receipt clean
sync_semantics.YELLOW: usable, but a warning applies — read the relevant sync_note first
sync_semantics.RED: stop continuation — a blocker must be fixed or explained before any build work
